summary: Front-End Developer with 4 years of experience. Specialized in building web applications with Vue.js. Keen on making pixel-perfect interface and passionate in developing user-friendly system.

emotibot.summary1: Work closely with designers and project managers to build product from scratch to completion
emotibot.summary2: Integrating with Back-end services including RESTful API (through axios) and WebSocket API
emotibot.summary3: Develop with Vue.js and its ecosystem, including, Vue-router, Vuex, Vue I18n and Element UI

AI_bot.summary: AI Chatbots for answering common customer question which also allow human customer service to take action when customer's questions are out of robot's scope.
AI_bot.bullet1: Develop CMS system features for human customer service
AI_bot.bullet2: Customize chat bot web page for each project with RWD. Devices include PC, tablet and mobile
AI_bot.bullet3: Handle cross-browser compatibility issues. Browsers include Chrome 66+, Firefox 87+, Safari, IE11 and Edge.

voice_platform.summary: A system that allows users to train and test models for ASR(Automatic Speech Recognition) and TTS(Text To Speech) techniques.
voice_platform.bullet1: Build a transcription application that allows user to either record audio for real-time transcription or upload recordings for offline transcription
voice_platform.bullet2: Implement real-time ASR service with WebSocket API

AICC.product: 3. AICC - An AI-based quality assurance system for customer service
AICC.summary: A system that allows users to write custom rules and upload call recordings to evaluate customer service performance. A rule is constructed from training keywords to writing logical semantics. Evaluation result is visualized in dialog-like interface with rule highlighting and recording play back features.
AICC.bullet1: Develop highly reusable components for building complicated logical rules
AICC.bullet2: Support internationalization(i18n) in Traditional Chinese and Simplified Chinese
AICC.bullet3: Visualize customer service workers' performance using Apache Echarts
